Petition For Order To Establish And Fund Special Needs Trust For Remainder Beneficiary; Appoint Trustee; Set Bond; Authorize Payment Of Trustee Fees On Account; And Allow Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Linda Durston for and with Karen Lam.
Susanna Cohen for and with Karen Fischer (Proposed Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to establishing a Special Needs Trust and the requirement of a new case number. Counsel also expressed concern regarding Philip being disqualified for SSI benefits and being discharged from the residential setting he is currently in. The Petition to Establish & Fund Special Needs Trust, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Establish And Fund Special Needs Trust For Remainder Beneficiary; Appoint Trustee; Set Bond; Authorize Payment Of Trustee Fees On Account; And Allow Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Linda Durston for Karen Lam (Guardian Ad Litem).
Susana Cohen for and with Karen Fisher (Proposed Trustee).

Ms. Durston stated that a response to the Probate Examiner's notes is prepared, but it is not filed and addressed the issue of standing. The Petition for Order to Establish and Fund Special Needs Trust, etc. is continued to May 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Durston to file her response to the notes. Ms. Cohen stated that she will file a declaration regarding urgency, that Philip is in the process of being evicted and that her Client needs to be in a position to assist with housing.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Bruner Nash for (petitioner) Mechanics Bank.

The Court asked counsel if she had anything additional to report regarding the trustee or attorney's fees. Ms. Nash responded that they are happy with whatever the Court decides. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Agnieszka Adams for Anne Nash.

The Court stated that it questioned the particular ETF's selected and asked what the purpose was. Ms. Adams stated that it was for diversification, that it was not much money to invest and it was a low cost and that funds are traded on an exchange. The Court stated its concern with ETF's and asked if the rest of the portfolio was not so aggressively invested. Ms. Adams reported that overall there is $1,800,000.00 in funds, that it was a small portion of the overall investment and that there are no time sheets to provide. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)
